Fixlet.Relevance: (exists string "ProductVersion" whose (it as string >= "15.0" and it as string < "16.0") of dictionary of it) of file "/System/Library/CoreServices/SystemVersion.plist"
(exists string "CFBundleVersion" whose (it as string != "20624.2.5.18.7") of dictionary of it) of file "/Applications/Safari.app/Contents/version.plist"
((version (version of application "Safari.app" as string & ".0.0") < "26.5.2" as version))
